fields.name: Engine Components
fields.description: Parts related to the engine including filters, belts, and sensors.

fields.name: Transmission Components
fields.description: Parts related to the transmission system such as clutches and gears.

fields.name: Brake Components
fields.description: Parts related to the braking system including pads, rotors, and calipers.

fields.name: Cooling System Components
fields.description: Parts related to the cooling system such as radiators, water pumps, and thermostats.

fields.name: Electrical Components
fields.description: Parts related to the electrical system including batteries, alternators, and starters.

fields.name: Suspension Components
fields.description: Parts related to the suspension system including shock absorbers, struts, and springs.

fields.name: Exhaust System Components
fields.description: Parts related to the exhaust system including mufflers, catalytic converters, and exhaust pipes.

fields.name: Fuel System Components
fields.description: Parts related to the fuel system including fuel pumps, injectors, and filters.

fields.name: Heating and Air Conditioning Components
fields.description: Parts related to the HVAC system including compressors, condensers, and evaporators.

fields.name: Miscellaneous Components
fields.description: Various components that do not fit into other categories.
